rationale: The cited paper is used in a grouped, high-level citation to support the claim that text mining is increasingly used in marketing research. The citing article does not assign Tirunillai and Tellis (2014) a distinct role in its theory development, causal identification, or core empirical design. Although the paper uses LDA-based text analysis, the method grounding is attributed directly to LDA sources (e.g., Blei et al. 2003), so this citation functions as background context rather than a specific building block.
